text: Design together with T-73 if possible: timeline/history becomes much easier to discuss in chat if note events have stable human-referenceable IDs rather than only timestamps and text.

Copilot is right: design with T-73. Timeline/history querying ('show all events since timestamp X', 'show all note events across all tickets') becomes much more useful when notes have stable IDs. Block on T-73 design decision.
all the usual queries one would do are already covered with 'show -a', 'show -n', 'resume' and 'grep'. no need to add more bells and whistles, querying is already easy
